title: Critique (one judge, one iteration)
description: What each of the 5 judges returns for an iteration: a verdict + an array of specific, executable findings. One file per judge at <sandbox_root>/iter<N>/critiques/<reviewer>.json. The scientific_writer optimizes against these findings; the peer_reviewer grades independently (it does NOT just aggregate these).

reviewer.description: Reviewer name, exactly as in the agent file (roles/<reviewer>.md).

overall.description: Lead verdict. 'block' = a defect severe enough to fail the paper regardless of other axes (the peer_reviewer must independently confirm a block before it gates).

finding.description: What is wrong, missing, or excess. Be specific. Cite numbers.

proposed_action.description: Concrete next step. Make it executable.

target_artifact.description: The file the action would touch (a sandbox working-copy path, e.g. iter2/draft.md, iter2/figures/fig3.png, iter2/code/plot.py).

evidence.description: file:line, CSV row, figure path, or quoted number that grounds the finding.
